evals.prompt: 我要怎么下载安装 shell-manage？我是 Apple Silicon Mac。
expected_behaviors: Resolves knowledge root and reads distribution-manifest.yaml
Selects stable arm64 macOS download URL
Provides 3-5 install steps with success criteria and rollback path

evals.prompt: 帮我把这个 Next.js 项目接入 shell-manage，项目路径是 /Users/dev/my-app
expected_behaviors: Reads package.json scripts before proposing commands
Proposes cd /Users/dev/my-app && npm run dev style one-liners
Validates before write; asks confirmation; reports write_status

evals.prompt: 给 shell-manage 新增一个叫 dev 的命令，但配置里已经有 dev 了
shell-manage 怎么用标签筛选命令？
expected_behaviors: Answers usage question without modifying config
Includes next step, success criteria, and rollback note

evals.prompt: 升级 shell-manage 后软件打不开了，怎么回滚？
expected_behaviors: Follows troubleshooting branches from knowledge base
Checks macOS security gate and architecture mismatch first
Provides executable rollback steps within 5 steps
